name: Cryptographic Hash Function
statement: H: {0,1}* → {0,1}^256 satisfying preimage resistance, collision resistance, pseudo-randomness

name: Mining Time Distribution
statement: Time T between successive blocks follows Exp(p/τ₀)

name: Double-Spend Probability
statement: P(z) = I_4pq(z, 1/2) where I_x is regularized incomplete beta function

name: Exponential Decay
statement: P(z) ~ s^z / sqrt(π(1-s)z) as z→∞ where s=4pq

name: Honest Mining Optimal
statement: Revenue-maximizing strategy is to publish immediately (no difficulty adjustment)

name: Selfish Mining
statement: Profitable when q > (1-γ)/(3-2γ); for γ=0.5 threshold is q>0.25

name: Dark Knowledge Transfer
statement: High-T limit: KL reduces to matching logit differences

name: Neighborhood Aggregation
statement: GNN computes h_v^(l+1) via aggregation over N(v)

name: Sybil Attack
statement: Creation of multiple fake identities by single entity

name: Verification Graph
statement: Directed graph G=(V,E) with in-degree ≥k for all vertices

name: Equal Per-Capita Distribution
statement: r_i(t) = R(t)/|V(t)| achieves equal allocation given no Sybils
